languages.text: "Не маловат ли ваш полк, чтобы носить такое звание?"
"Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"
languages.original_text: "Не маловат ли ваш полк, чтобы носить такое звание?"

traits.locale_text: "Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"
"Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"
"Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"
"Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"

languages.text: 「君の連隊の規模では、この階級は少し不釣り合いじゃないか？」
languages.original_text: "Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"

traits.locale_text: 君の連隊の規模では、この階級は少し不釣り合いじゃないか？

languages.text: « Votre grade n'est-il pas un peu élevé pour un régiment d'une taille aussi modeste ? »
languages.original_text: "Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre grade n'est-il pas un peu élevé pour un régiment d'une taille aussi modeste ? »

languages.text: "Alayınız bu rütbeyi taşımanız için biraz küçük değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"

traits.locale_text: "Alayınız bu rütbeyi taşımanız için biraz küçük değil mi?"

languages.text: «¿No es su regimiento un poco pequeño para tener ese rango?».
languages.original_text: "Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"

traits.locale_text: «¿No es su regimiento un poco pequeño para tener ese rango?».

languages.text: “以这个军团的规模来看，你的头衔是否有些名不副实了？”
languages.original_text: "Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"

traits.locale_text: “以这个军团的规模来看，你的头衔是否有些名不副实了？”

languages.text: "Ist Euer Regiment nicht etwas zu klein, als dass Ihr diesen Rang einnehmen solltet?"
languages.original_text: "Isn't your regiment a little small for you to bear this rank?"

traits.locale_text: "Ist Euer Regiment nicht etwas zu klein, als dass Ihr diesen Rang einnehmen solltet?"
